sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';
import { Link as RouterLink } from 'react-router-dom';
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Container,
  Typography,
  Grid,
  Card,
  CardContent,
  Stack,
  Paper,
  useTheme
} from '@mui/material';
import AutoAwesomeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/AutoAwesome';
import EditNoteIcon from '@mui/icons-material/EditNote';
import VerifiedIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Verified';

const HomePage = () => {
  const theme = useTheme();

  return (
    <Box>
      {/* Hero Section with Gradient */}
      <Box 
        sx={{
          background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4A90E2 0%, #6C63FF 100%)',
          color: 'white',
          pt: 12,
          pb: 12,
          position: 'relative',
          overflow: 'hidden'
        }}
      >
        <Box 
          sx={{
            position: 'absolute',
            top: 0,
            left: 0,
            right: 0,
            bottom: 0,
            opacity: 0.1,
            backgroundImage: 'radial-gradient(circle, #ffffff 1px, transparent 1px)',
            backgroundSize: '20px 20px'
          }}
        />
        <Container maxWidth="lg">
          <Grid container spacing={6} alignItems="center">
            <Grid item xs={12} md={7}>
              <Typography variant="h1" gutterBottom>
                Turn "It was good" into testimonials that actually sell
              </Typography>
              <Typography variant="h6" sx={{ mb: 4, fontWeight: 400, opacity: 0.9 }}>
                AI-powered testimonial enhancement with client verification
              </Typography>
              <Stack direction={{ xs: 'column', sm: 'row' }} spacing={2}>
                <Button 
                  variant="contained" 
                  color="secondary" 
                  size="large"
                  component={RouterLink}
                  to="/enhance"
                  sx={{ 
                    px: 4, 
                    py: 1.5,
                    boxShadow: '0 8px 20px rgba(108, 99, 255, 0.3)'
                  }}
                >
                  Get Started - It's Free
                </Button>
                <Button 
                  variant="outlined" 
                  size="large"
                  component={RouterLink}
                  to="/pricing"
                  sx={{ 
                    px: 4, 
                    py: 1.5,
                    color: 'white',
                    borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5)',
                    '&:hover': {
                      borderColor: 'white',
                      backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1)'
                    }
                  }}
                >
                  See Pricing
                </Button>
              </Stack>
            </Grid>
            <Grid item xs={12} md={5}>
              <Box 
                sx={{ 
                  display: { xs: 'none', md: 'block' },
                  position: 'relative'
                }}
              >
                <Paper 
                  elevation={6}
                  sx={{
                    p: 3,
                    borderRadius: 2,
                    backgroundColor: 'white',
                    transform: 'rotate(-5deg)',
                    mb: 2,
                    position: 'relative',
                    zIndex: 2
                  }}
                >
                  <Typography variant="body2" color="text.secondary" gutterBottom>
                    Original
                  </Typography>
                  <Typography variant="body1" color="text.primary">
                    "The coaching was good. I learned some things that helped me."
                  </Typography>
                </Paper>
                <Paper 
                  elevation={6}
                  sx={{
                    p: 3,
                    borderRadius: 2,
                    background: 'linear-gradient(to right, #ffffff, #f0f7ff)',
                    transform: 'rotate(2deg)',
                    position: 'relative',
                    zIndex: 1,
                    border: '1px solid rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.3)'
                  }}
                >
                  <Typography variant="body2" color="primary" gutterBottom>
                    Enhanced
                  </Typography>
                  <Typography variant="body1" color="text.primary">
                    "Working with Sarah transformed how I approach challenges. I went from feeling stuck to landing two major clients in just 3 weeks!"
                  </Typography>
                </Paper>
              </Box>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Container>
      </Box>

      {/* How It Works Section */}
      <Container maxWidth="lg" sx={{ py: 10 }}>
        <Typography variant="h2" align="center" gutterBottom>
          How It Works
        </Typography>
        <Typography variant="subtitle1" align="center" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mb: 6 }}>
          Three simple steps to transform your testimonials
        </Typography>
        
        <Grid container spacing={4}>
          <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
            <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
              <CardContent sx={{ p: 4 }}>
                <EditNoteIcon color="primary" sx={{ fontSize: 40, mb: 2 }} />
                <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
                  1. Submit raw testimonial
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Paste your client's words or upload audio. Our AI works with any format.
                </Typography>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </Grid>
          
          <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
            <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
              <CardContent sx={{ p: 4 }}>
                <AutoAwesomeIcon color="primary" sx={{ fontSize: 40, mb: 2 }} />
                <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
                  2. Get AI-enhanced version
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Our AI extracts transformation, emotion, and impact to create a compelling story.
                </Typography>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </Grid>
          
          <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
            <Card sx={{ height: '100%' }}>
              <CardContent sx={{ p: 4 }}>
                <VerifiedIcon color="primary" sx={{ fontSize: 40, mb: 2 }} />
                <Typography variant="h4" gutterBottom>
                  3. One-click client approval
                </Typography>
                <Typography variant="body1" color="text.secondary">
                  Send a link, client confirms with one click. No awkward back-and-forth.
                </Typography>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </Grid>
        </Grid>
      </Container>

      {/* Before & After Section */}
      <Box sx={{ 
        background: 'linear-gradient(to bottom, #f0f7ff, #ffffff)',
        py: 10
      }}>
        <Container maxWidth="lg">
          <Typography variant="h2" align="center" gutterBottom>
            Before & After
          </Typography>
          <Typography variant="subtitle1" align="center" color="text.secondary" sx={{ mb: 6 }}>
            See the difference Testy makes
          </Typography>
          
          <Grid container spacing={4}>
            <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
              <Card sx={{ height: '100%', bgcolor: '#f8fafc' }}>
                <CardContent sx={{ p: 4 }}>
                  <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom color="text.secondary">
                    Original
                  </Typography>
                  <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ fontSize: '1.1rem' }}>
                    "The coaching was good. I learned some things that helped me."
                  </Typography>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </Grid>
            
            <Grid item xs={12} md={6}>
              <Card sx={{ 
                height: '100%', 
                background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #ebf3ff 0%, #f5f7ff 100%)',
                border: '1px solid rgba(74, 144, 226, 0.3)'
              }}>
                <CardContent sx={{ p: 4 }}>
                  <Typography variant="h6" gutterBottom color="primary">
                    Enhanced
                  </Typography>
                  <Typography variant="body1" sx={{ fontSize: '1.1rem' }}>
                    "Working with Sarah transformed how I approach challenges. I went from feeling stuck to landing two major clients in just 3 weeks. Her coaching didn't just teach me tactics—it changed my entire mindset about what's possible."
                  </Typography>
                </CardContent>
              </Card>
            </Grid>
          </Grid>
        </Container>
      </Box>

      {/* CTA Section */}
      <Box sx={{ 
        background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #4A90E2 0%, #6C63FF 100%)',
        color: 'white',
        py: 8,
        mt: 10
      }}>
        <Container maxWidth="md" sx={{ textAlign: 'center' }}>
          <Typography variant="h3" gutterBottom>
            Ready to transform your testimonials?
          </Typography>
          <Typography variant="subtitle1" sx={{ mb: 4, opacity: 0.9 }}>
            Start free, upgrade when you need more.
          </Typography>
          <Button 
            variant="contained" 
            color="secondary" 
            size="large"
            component={RouterLink}
            to="/enhance"
            sx={{ 
              px: 4, 
              py: 1.5,
              backgroundColor: 'white',
              color: theme.palette.primary.main,
              '&:hover': {
                backgroundColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9)'
              }
            }}
          >
            Get Started Now
          </Button>
        </Container>
      </Box>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default HomePage;
